reviews.review_title: All of the reviews are a lie
reviews.review_description: Everybody saying they’re getting banned for using mods that come with the game that’s because they’re using them in infection it is a Great game Just make it less buggy.
W game the mods are fun but D O   N O T   M O D   O N   I N F E C T I O N/T A G.   Anyways all the stuff we have in the game is INSANE! Too bad its litteraly 1:40 AM for me rn so yeah W game
I love mods in the game

It's a great game. Basically gorilla tag except you have every mod you can think of. I can't get mad at the banning system because I have never been banned in this game but I hear it's dumb. I have one question though. How do you get finger painter in here because I saw someone with it. Overall good game
